children.name: hwWlanOnlineStaCntHistoryTable
children.description: This table describes historical number of access users, which is counted every 1 min. The AC stores data in the latest 15 min.

children.name: hwWlanOnlineStaCntHistoryEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanOnlineStaCntTime.

children.name: hwWlan5gOnlineStaCnt
children.description: This object indicates the number of users connected to the 5G radio.

children.name: hwBranchGroupFileLoadFailGroupNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of branch groups that failed to load the certificate.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalWorkMode
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanApCount
children.description: This object indicates the total of AP.

children.name: hwWlanApStaOfflineRateComplianceRate
children.description:
This object indicates compliance ratio of the AP's STA offline rate.
Unit: 0.01 Compliance standard: STA offline rate x (x = 20%) Offline rate = hwStaExceptionalOfflineCnt/hwStaAuthenRequestSuccessCount. Abnormal APs are those in fault, version mismatch, and type mismatch.

children.name: hwWlanApComplianceRate
children.description: This object indicates the total AP compliance ratio.

children.name: hwWlanApNormalRatio
children.description:
This object indicates the proportion of APs in normal and commit states to all APs.
Unit: 0.01.

children.name: hwWlanApStaOnlineFailRateComplianceRate
children.description:
This object indicates compliance ratio of the AP's STA access failure rate.
Unit: 0.01 Compliance standard: STA access failure rate < x (x = 20%) Access failure rate = (hwStaAccessRequestFailedCount+hwStaAuthenRequestFailedCount)/(hwStaAssocAndReAssocRequestCount+hwStaAuthenRequestCount).

children.name: hwWlanApStaOnlineCntComplianceRate
children.description:
This object indicates compliance ratio of the number of access STAs on an AP.
Unit: 0.01 Compliance standard: Access STAs < x (x = 40). Access STAs refer to online STAs. Abnormal APs are those in fault, version mismatch, and type mismatch.

children.name: hwWlanServiceNormalAPCount
children.description: This object indicates the total of AP in service normal states.

children.name: hwWlanRfLoadNoncompliance5gCnt
children.description:
This object indicates the number of radios on which the 5G load fails to meet the compliance standard.
Compliance standard: Number of online users < x (x = 40).

children.name: hwWlanRfComplianceRate
children.description: This object indicates the total RF compliance ratio.

children.name: hwWlanRfChannelUtilRateNoncompliance5gCnt
children.description:
This object indicates the number of radios on which the 5G channel utilization fails to meet the compliance standard.
Compliance standard: Channel utilization < x (x = 70%).

children.name: hwWlanRfChannelJamRateComplianceRate
children.description:
This objects indicates compliance ratio of the RF interference ratio.
Unit: 0.01 Compliance standard: Interference ratio < x (x = 40%).

children.name: hwWlanRfNoiseNoncompliance6gCnt
children.description:
This object indicates the number of radios on which the 6G noise intensity fails to meet the compliance standard.
Compliance standard: Noise intensity < x (x = -80 dBm).

children.name: hwWlanRfNoiseNoncompliance2gCnt
children.description:
This object indicates the number of radios on which the 2.4G noise intensity fails to meet the compliance standard.
Compliance standard: Noise intensity < x (x = -80 dBm).

children.name: hwWlanRfResendRateComplianceRate
children.description:
This objects indicate compliance ratio of the RF retransmission rate (RR).
Unit: 0.01 Compliance standard: RR < x (x = 50%).

children.name: hwWlanRfChannelUtilRateNoncompliance6gCnt
children.description:
This object indicates the number of radios on which the 6G channel utilization fails to meet the compliance standard.
Compliance standard: Channel utilization < x (x = 70%).

children.name: hwWlanRfChannelUtilRateNoncompliance2gCnt
children.description:
This object indicates the number of radios on which the 2.4G channel utilization fails to meet the compliance standard.
Compliance standard: Channel utilization < x (x = 70%).

children.name: hwWlanCurAssocStaNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of associated users on an AC.

children.name: hwWlanCurAuthSuccessStaNum
children.description: This object indicates the total number of online STAs on an AC.

children.name: hwWlanCurAssoc2gStaNum
children.description: This object indicates the total number of 2.4G users on an AC.

children.name: hwWlanDualBandStaNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of support 2.4G and 5G STAs.

children.name: hwWlanCurAssoc6gStaType
children.description: This object indicates the numbers of 6G users with different rfmodes on an AC.

children.name: hwWlanCurAssoc2gStaType
children.description: This object indicates the numbers of 2.4G users with different rfmodes on an AC.
